one_time_description: Sale of Sawmill - non-recurring revenue item
economic_notes: Nation has multiple commercial enterprises including Ulkatcho Mercantile Ltd. (retail), West Chilcotin Forest Products Ltd. (forestry), Yun Ka Whut'en Development LP, 0690361 BC Ltd., and Ulkatcho Land Holdings Ltd. Post year-end restructuring approved to consolidate business entities under UFN Development LP. Nation under Management Action Plan initiated by ISC based on fiscal year 2013 financial position.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Ulkatcho Mercantile Ltd., 0690361 BC Ltd., Yun Ka Whut'en Development LP (West Chilcotin Forest Products), Yun Ka Whut'en Holdings Ltd., and Ulkatcho Land Holdings Ltd. One fully consolidated subsidiary: Chunta Resources Society. No schedule of remuneration for Chief, Council or staff included in the document. Nation has been under ISC Management Action Plan since 2013. Post year-end restructuring of business entities into UFN Development LP approved April 19, 2023. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($9,293,203) + Province of BC ($3,492,266) + First Nations Health Authority ($1,824,893) + FNESC ($395,928) + Environment and Climate Change Canada ($467,500) + Vancouver Coastal Health ($100,000) + Carrier Chilcotin Tribal Council ($206,292) + New Relationship Trust ($200,000) + Habitat Conservation Trust Foundation ($109,610) + CCATEC ($300,455) + Densiqi Services Society ($570,042) + Southern Dakelh Nation Alliance ($51,338) + Thompson Rivers University ($62,163) = $17,073,690 approximately; OSR adjusted accordingly. Long-term debt appears to be zero as no term loans outstanding at year end (prior year had principal reductions of $149,298). Housing units not separately disclosed though social housing assets appear on TCA schedule.
